mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_role (role_cd, tenant_id, role_nm, role_desc, use_yn, reg_dt, upd_dt) VALUES (#{roleCd}, #{tenantId}, #{roleNm}, #{roleDesc}, #{useYn}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_role SET role_nm = #{roleNm}, role_desc = #{roleDesc}, use_yn = #{useYn}, upd_dt = NOW() WHERE role_cd = #{roleCd} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
